skills.name: Data Engineering Fundamentals
skills.description: Introduction to data engineering concepts, roles, and the lifecycle of data systems.
skills.notes: Covers what data engineers do, differences from data scientists, and the full data lifecycle including generation, ingestion, storage, and serving.

skills.name: Programming & System Fundamentals
skills.description: Core programming and system knowledge required to build scalable data systems.
skills.notes: Includes Python, Java, or Scala, along with data structures, algorithms, Linux basics, networking, and distributed systems fundamentals.

skills.name: Databases (SQL & NoSQL)
skills.description: Understanding how to store, query, and manage structured and unstructured data.
skills.notes: Includes relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL systems (MongoDB, Cassandra, DynamoDB). Learn indexing, normalization, and query optimization.

skills.name: Data Warehousing
skills.description: Designing and managing systems for analytical data storage and reporting.
skills.notes: Includes tools like Snowflake, BigQuery, and Redshift. Learn star/snowflake schemas, OLAP systems, and data marts.

skills.name: Data Ingestion
skills.description: Collecting and importing data from various sources into storage systems.
skills.notes: Includes batch and real-time ingestion, APIs, logs, IoT data, and tools like Kafka and Flume.

skills.name: Data Pipelines (ETL/ELT)
skills.description: Designing workflows to process, transform, and move data efficiently.
skills.notes: Includes ETL/ELT processes, workflow orchestration tools like Apache Airflow, dbt, and Prefect.

skills.name: Big Data Technologies
skills.description: Tools and frameworks for processing large-scale distributed data.
skills.notes: Includes Apache Spark, Hadoop ecosystem (HDFS, YARN), and distributed computing concepts.

skills.name: Cloud Computing & Containers
skills.description: Deploying and managing data systems on cloud infrastructure with containerization.
skills.notes: Includes AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, and managed data services.

skills.name: Data Serving & Messaging
skills.description: Delivering processed data to applications and handling real-time data streams.
skills.notes: Includes APIs, dashboards, reverse ETL, and messaging systems like Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS.

skills.name: Data Governance, Security & Privacy
skills.description: Ensuring data quality, security, compliance, and proper usage across systems.
skills.notes: Includes data lineage, data quality checks, GDPR compliance, access control, and privacy best practices.
